title: arundinella hispida
intro: Arundinella hispida, also known as hispid grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to various parts of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Arundinella hispida has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
